name: LINCOLN NATIONAL CORP
business: Lincoln National Corporation is a holding company that operates multiple insurance and retirement businesses through subsidiary companies. Through four business segments, Annuities, Life Insurance, Group Protection, and Retirement Plan Services, it sells wealth accumulation, wealth protection, group protection, and retirement income products and solutions.
namedSuppliers: Security Life of Denver Insurance Company (a subsidiary of Resolution Life)
Commonwealth Annuity and Life Insurance Company (a subsidiary of Global Atlantic)
Hannover Life Reassurance Company of America (Bermuda) Ltd.

exposures.sentence: Through our business segments, we sell a wide range of wealth accumulation, wealth protection, group protection and retirement income products and solutions.

catalysts.event: Launch of Lincoln WealthProtector SM IUL
catalysts.sentence: Lincoln WealthBuilder IUL and Lincoln WealthBuilder ECV IUL were launched in the first half of 2025, and our Lincoln WealthProtector SM IUL was launched in February 2026.
